controller.prompt: Further adjustments required? Check the 'Adjust Prosthesis (3D transform handles)' box.
Further screw adjustments required? Check the 'Adjust screw' box.

requests.message: ContractFidelity: cb_step_18 intent 'view_display_scope' is not supported by cookbook/source step text; display-scope intent requires view/display/visibility text evidence
ContractFidelity: cb_step_22 intent 'view_display_scope' is not supported by cookbook/source step text; display-scope intent requires view/display/visibility text evidence

cb_step_1.title: Select CT Volume
cb_step_1.instruction: Choose the CT volume for processing.

cb_step_2.title: Create Bone Segmentation
cb_step_2.instruction: Switch to Segment Editor module and create a new segmentation named 'Bone_Segmentation'.

cb_step_3.title: Add Segment
cb_step_3.instruction: Click 'Add' to create a new segment and rename it to 'Bone_Segment'.

cb_step_4.title: Open Threshold
cb_step_4.instruction: Click the 'Threshold' button in Segment Editor.

cb_step_5.title: Set Threshold Range
cb_step_5.instruction: Adjust the threshold slider to define the bone segmentation range.

cb_step_6.title: Apply Threshold
cb_step_6.instruction: Click the 'Apply' button to run thresholding.

cb_step_9.title: Apply Islands
cb_step_9.instruction: Click the 'Apply' button to keep the largest island.

cb_step_10.title: Select Bone Segment
cb_step_10.instruction: Select the bone segment node from the scene.

cb_step_12.title: Adjust View for Fiducial Placement
cb_step_12.instruction: Rotate and zoom the 3D view to get a clear angle of the glenoid cavity surface.

cb_step_13.title: Create Prosthesis Center Point
cb_step_13.instruction: Switch to Markups module, click 'Point List', and create a fiducial node named 'Prosthesis_center_point'.

cb_step_14.title: Place Prosthesis Center Point
cb_step_14.instruction: Click on the glenoid cavity surface to place the center point.

cb_step_15.title: Select Planning Point
cb_step_15.instruction: Select the MarkupsFiducial node you just created.

cb_step_17.title: Adjust Prosthesis?
cb_step_17.instruction: If needed, check the 'Adjust Prosthesis (3D transform handles)' box, otherwise click Done to continue.

cb_step_18.title: Adjust View for Prosthesis
cb_step_18.instruction: Rotate and zoom the 3D view to inspect the prosthesis placement.

cb_step_20.title: Generate Plan
cb_step_20.instruction: Click the 'Plan' button to generate the screw plan.

cb_step_21.title: Adjust Screw?
cb_step_21.instruction: If needed, check the 'Adjust screw' box, otherwise click Done to finish.

cb_step_22.title: Adjust View for Screw Paths
cb_step_22.instruction: Rotate and zoom the 3D view to clearly see the planning paths.

operation_descriptions: Add a segment and rename to 'Bone_Segment'
Open Threshold effect in Segment Editor
Open Islands effect in Segment Editor
Add a segment and rename to 'Bone_Segment'
Open Threshold effect in Segment Editor
Open Islands effect in Segment Editor
Manually adjust the 3D view to get the best angle for placing the fiducial point on the glenoid cavity surface.
Manually click on the glenoid cavity surface to select a point for the "Prosthesis_center_point".
Manually click on the glenoid cavity surface to select a point for the "Prosthesis_center_point".
Manually adjust the endpoints of the planning paths.
